name: property managers handling 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 properties, inconsistent scheduling causes compliance issues. We automate inspection scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking of inspections.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of facility inspections leading to compliance issues.
